title: Seared Delicate Fish with Korean-Style Poke Sauce
description: A delicate fish dish seared to perfection and served with a flavorful Korean-inspired poke sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat sesame oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the delicate fish fillets with salt and pepper.
3. Sear the fish for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, combine soy sauce, korean chili flakes, brown sugar, and grated ginger in a bowl.
5. Add the pork belly to the bowl and marinate for at least 15 minutes.
6. After marinating, heat a tablespoon of sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
7. Add the marinated pork belly and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until crispy.
8. Stir in the green onions and cook for an additional minute.
9. Serve the seared delicate fish with the Korean-style poke sauce and garnish with sesame seeds.
